title: Signal Connections Conveyor
description:
Signal Connections Conveyor

Signal Connections

The table below lists the connectors on the PG board and the compatible connectors for wiring:

Receptacle on the Board	DXA10A-100S

(manufacturer: Hirose Electric Co.,Ltd.)

Wiring Plug Connectors	Individually pressed-in type	DX30-100P (for AWG#30)

DX30A-100P (for AWG#28)

Pressed-in-as-a-whole type	DX31-100P (for AWG#30)

DX31A-100P (for AWG#28)

Soldered type	DX40-100P

Connector for Wiring to the Cover	DX-100-CV1
